This product has been replaced by ARTG 446290 - OZEMPIC 0.25 mg/0.5mg semaglutide (rys) 0.68 mg/mL solution for injection in 3mL pre-filled pen.

An updated TGA web statement about Ozempic supply is available at: https://www.tga.gov.au/safety/shortages/information-about-major-medicine-shortages/ozempic-semaglutide-supply-information
